message:
feat(abi): promote alias database and hosts iteration from host delegation to native

Replace 9 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- alias db (5): endaliasent/getaliasbyname/getaliasbyname_r/getaliasent/
  getaliasent_r — native /etc/aliases parser with thread-local iterator,
  member list packing, and glibc-matching ENOENT errno behavior
- hosts db (4): sethostent/endhostent/gethostent/gethostent_r — native
  /etc/hosts iterator with IPv4/IPv6 binary address conversion, alias
  lists, and address pointer arrays

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 17 → 12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
